title: astro_intent_detected
description: TwinBrain Web_Astro engine — emitted after period classification (LLM mini → fallback regex bccm_transit_detect_intent → default 'day'). Drives Transit Resolver lookup window. PHASE-A C.3b (2026-06-04).

tokens.description: Total tokens consumed by the classify LLM call (0 if source != 'llm').
